meaning: n.塞瓶的人(或器具),<美俚>非凡出众者
examples: "I had hoped for more," said Corker.
Corker dares to point out what everybody knows but nobody will say.
Republican Senator Bob Corker of Tennessee is an ardent opponent of tax hikes.
Robert Corker was mayor of Chattanooga before being elected a U.S. senator in 2006.
When Senator Shelby decided he could no longer take part, Senator Corker stepped up.
